_meta.author: Ali-Hussein-dev
_meta.title: Card with Cross Patter
_meta.description:
A striking card component featuring a pattern of intersecting diagonal lines that form X shapes. This pattern creates a bold, geometric texture that's perfect for high-impact UI elements and featured content sections.

Features

- Bold X-pattern created by intersecting diagonal lines
- Thicker stroke width (6.5px) for enhanced visibility
- Larger pattern size (95px grid)
- Dark/Light mode support
- Smooth gradient overlay
- Built with shadcn/ui theme system
- Framer Motion entrance animation
